description: The role of MUC21 in oral squamous cell carcinoma (OSCC) remains unexplored. name: Gene expression profile of PBMCs in lung transplants with BOS and those without BOS
chinese_name: Gene expression profile of PBMCs in lung
description: Gene expression profiling was performed in PBMCs collected from 26 lung transplant recipients at 3 and 10 months after transplantation and prior to development of BOS. Results: there was a substantial proportion of genes (~1800) changed over time in BOS patients but not in non-BOS patients.

name: Transcriptomic profiling of peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMC) from patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD), Spino
description: To investigate the role of RNA metabolism in Parkinson’s disease in the etiology of Parkinson’s disease, we conducted a global RNA expression profiling in PBMC of PD and SCA2 patients versus controls.
